topic: dma_async_issue_pending is required to start the transfer
q: DMA 描述符 submit 了但传输不动,缺了什么?

corruptions.why: 编造的拿通道函数,真名 dma_request_chan

forbidden: 以为 dmaengine_submit 会自动启动传输
rubric: dmaengine_submit 只把描述符排队并返回 cookie,必须再调 dma_async_issue_pending 才把传输推给硬件;停止用 dmaengine_terminate_sync;CONFIG_DMA_ENGINE 是框架开关
